The '''2011 Castleford Tigers season''' was the [[Castleford Tigers|club]]'s 14th year in the [[Super League]]. The club finished in 9th place, one position below the play-offs. Castleford also reached the semi-final of the [[Challenge Cup]], but lost 8–10 against [[Leeds Rhinos]] in [[extra time]].
